item.title: Vintage Sansui G-3000 Stereo Receiver - $380 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Sansui G-3000 receiver. Excellent condition with a little wear on the faceplate as seen in photos. New bulbs. Checked out by a tech. Controls cleaned. Can run 2 sets of speakers. Works great and sounds amazing. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. These are highly desirable receivers. Nice example for $380 firm.

item.title: Sony STR-DE185 Stereo Receiver - $30 (Exeter)
item.description: Good working receiver with remote control. Rated 100x2. Clean unit, but does have some scratches. Nice 2-channel unit.

item.title: Denon AVR-75 stereo receiver - $40 (Exeter)
item.description: Nice working Denon receiver. Rated at 75w per channel, it has a good amount of power. Sounds nice. No remote, but you can find them online for $20-25 if necessary. Sensor has been tested to work with an alternate remote.

item.title: Stereo receiver - Pyle PT 390AU - $150 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: new. still in original box. used only once.

item.title: Dennon Surround Receiver - $175 (Smithfield)
item.description: Dennon Surround Receiver with remote like new. $175

item.title: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player - $80 (Cranston)
item.description: Ion Profile Pro USB Input with Turntable Record Player

item.title: Portable Turntable - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: Crosley CR40 Portable Turntable/Record Player used in great shape works perfect

item.title: Portable Turntable/Record Player - $50 (Woonsocket)
item.description: CR6002A-BK

item.title: Technics SL-L20 Linear Tracking Turntable - $180 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful Technics SL-L20 linear tracking automatic turntable in excellent condition and working great. Sleek looking and easy to use. Sounds fantastic. Hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Brand new belt. Sweet table for $180 firm.

item.title: Vintage Magnavox Micromatic Suitcase Stereo Record Player - $40 (Cranston)
item.description: Cool old Magnavox Micromatic solid state record player. Excellent cosmetic condition but needs work. Selling as a project. Super cool looking unit for $40 firm.

item.title: Ohm E Vintage Stereo Speakers - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice pair of Ohm Model E speakers. Sound excellent. Cosmetically good. All drivers working well. I can demo them in my garage. One set of binding posts has been replaced. This is an early pair so if you like vintage, come and get them. Nice old pair of speakers for $49 firm.

item.title: Polk Audio T15 Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $50 (Cranston)
item.description: Height 10.63" (27 cm)

item.title: Mirage M-290 Bookshelf Stereo Speakers - $60 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice pair of Mirage M-290 two way bookshelf stereo speakers. Very good sounding speakers. Good condition. grills included. Bi-wirable. Jumpers included for regular wiring. They are hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great speakers for $60 firm.

item.title: Sony SS-H3300 Stereo Speakers - $59 (Cranston)
item.description: Beautiful pair of Sony SS-H3300 stereo speakers in excellent condition and sound fantastic. 3 way speakers with 5" woofer, 1" tweeter and 13/16" super tweeter. I have them hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Great speakers for $59 firm.

item.title: Sansui D-X311WR Auto-Reverse Dual Cassette Deck - $49 (Cranston)
item.description: Nice Sansui D-X311WR auto-reverse dual cassette deck. Has Dolby B&C noise reduction and an MPX filter. Very nice condition. Works and is hooked up in my garage for demonstration. Cool blast from the past for $49 firm.

item.title: I Buy Vintage Stereo Equipment - Receivers, Speakers Etc... - $100 (Cranston)
item.description: I like to buy, tinker with and collect vintage stereo equipment. I like old receivers, speakers, turntables, tape decks, cd players etc... I'll even buy some broken stuff (depending what it is). Let me know what you have and where it is located. You can email me through craigslist or call or text the phone number that comes up when you click "reply" at the top left corner of my ad. Thanks, Bill

item.title: Polk Audio 6 speaker set wih Tuner, cd burner, cassette deck - $400 (Contoocook, NH)
item.description: 4 corner speakers, center speaker, sub woofer speaker. Sony amp receiver. Sony Dual cassette deck. Harmon Kardon CD burner. 200' speaker wire. Has been a fantastic system but thinking about upgrading. Only serious inquiries need to reply. Please email for original receipts more than 2300.00, manuals, pics and all paperwork. One owner only, me

item.title: Vintage multi-function stereo system - $40 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Fisher stereo system: AM/FM tuner (works great!). turntable (not tested). 8-track (not tested). cassette player (not tested).

item.title: Gemini TT-900WW bluetooth turntable - $75 (Johnston)
item.description: Gemini TT-900WW Modern Bluetooth Turntable System.

item.title: Victrola turntable 6 in 1 - $75 (Johnston)
item.description: Victrola 6-in-1 Turntable, a multimedia center designed to play various audio formats with a vintage aesthetic

item.title: Sherwood RA-1145R stereo - $50 (Warwick)
item.description: Sherwood RA-1145R amp receiver

item.title: FOR SALE: MICRO SEIKI DD-40 TURNTABLE - $1,600
item.description: Up for sale one Micro Seiki DD-40 turntable in nice condition with original box and manual. Also, in good condition original dust cover, 45-RPM adapter and removable headshell. Comes with Ortofon VMS-30 cartridge. The plinth is rosewood veneer in excellent condition. I am the original owner purchased new in 1977. The turntable is 43 years old and has been sitting in the original box for over 15 years. There is a couple of small cracks near the dust cover hinges (see images). From a smoke free home. The turntable is sold as is per my description NO RETURNS.

item.description: Good working, clean Yamaha 5-channel receiver. Comes with the original remote (not shown but included). Sounds good and looks good.

item.description: Denon Home Theater Receiver. Not much use on it, used it as a 2nd system in the house. Plenty of HDMI ports, My man cave has recently been turned into a kids playroom so no need for this anymore. Will sell for $200

item.description: Works fine no remote call [15]show contact info

item.title: Onkyo TX-SR608 receiver - $20 (Exeter)
item.description: The receiver powers on and plays music. Tuner and CD input work great. These receivers are known to have the HDMI board fail. This one has this issue, so the HDMI does not work but works fine otherwise. Cheap powerful receiver for the garage or to just use the inputs other than HDMI.

item.title: Pioneer HTP-101 Home Theater System Vintage - $175
item.description: Pioneer HTP-101 Home Theater System Vintage

item.title: Wireless Speaker Kit - $25 (PROVIDENCE, RI)
item.description: Experience high-quality audio with the RocketFish RF-WHTIB-A Wireless Rear Speaker Kit. It enables a wireless (not to be confused with WiFi) connection from a stereo receiver or TV, etc. to a set of speakers. Perfect for those situations in which wired connections are not possible.

item.title: Technics SA-202 and SA-505 receiver with other vintage audio - $575 (Warwick)
item.description: Technics receiver, all functions work on the receiver, the SA-505 has been serviced and recapped CLEAN!!!

item.title: Home theater setup - $150 (North Smithfield)
item.description: Theater setup includes technics SA-DX930 stereo receiver, Bose 5 channel speaker system 2 front, 2 rear, a subwoofer and front channel. Additional powered Sony subwoofer also included.

item.title: Vintage Radio Shack / Realistic / Micronta Hoard - $150 (Wrentham)
item.description: This is all stuff that I've used at some point in my distant past. Everything is branded as indicated. It is all at least 35 years old and everything works except the 12" speakers. Included in the lot:

item.title: technics amplifier with receiver and speakers - $125 (seekonk)
item.description: technics amp, 350 watt, model SU-V75 ( 17"Wx8.75"Dx3.75"H ), stereo receiver, 9 watt, model ST-S74 ( 17"Wx5"Dx1.75"H ) with two WIRED boston acoustics CR 75 bookshelf speakers (can be wall mounted) ( 7.75"Wx10"Dx12"H )

item.title: Mackie 16 Chanel mixing board - $200 (North kingstown)
item.description: Mackie mixer in great condition . Everything works. Also available hard case , rack mount compressor, and stereo equalizer.

item.title: Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder - $75 (West Warwick, RI)
item.description: The Olympus S725 Pearlcorder Microcassette Recorder comes with voice activation so you can utilize it "hands-free" recording if desired. It also features fast play mode for playback that is 25-percent faster, and external jacks for a remote control, headphones, earphones, and AC power.

item.description: Great planes corsair radio control airplane receiver ready uses 2200 lipo battery has plug in landing gear never used.

item.title: Radio control airplane - $75 (Tiverton)
item.description: This is a radio control airplane. Receiver ready never used . Made for 22 lipo battery , not included Local pick up only.

item.title: 2017 freedom food truck / trailer - $42,000 (Richmond)
item.description: For sale

item.title: 2016 HARLEY DAVIDSON ROAD GLIDE ULTRA - $15,999 (Portsmouth RI)
item.description: 2016 Harley Davidson Road Glide Ultra, only 12,300 miles. Original owner. Garaged, covered. All services done at Harley Davidson. Additional items. Screaming Eagle high flow ventilation air cleaner, driver back rest, highway pegs, chrome passenger footrest covers, rear tire replace at 9096 miles, lithium battery installed at 10547 miles, Screaming Eagle muffler, end caps and stage one tuning kit. Quick release for trunk and passenger backrest. Additional negotiable items. Full face HD helmet, two women's half helmets in excellent condition, lithium battery charger, two men's HD riding jackets. Premium HD stereo helmet headset. HD full helmet music and communication headset, HD motorcycle cover, bladder suspension pump. Kelly Blue book lists at $21,100. Motivated seller.

item.title: Garmin eTrex HC Series GPS Trail Navigation Device with all its extras - $25 (Providence, RI)
item.description: The Garmin eTrex Venture HC is a handheld GPS navigator with a high-sensitivity GPS receiver, a 2.2-inch, 256-color screen, and 24MB of internal memory. It also includes a basemap, geocaching capabilities, and supports a variety of optional maps.

item.title: Magnavox concert grand - $900 (Barrington)
item.description: 1959 Magnavox concert grand. This was electronically restored before I bought it six years ago. Sounds absolutely incredible. The turntable will need some work. Currently stuck on one speed and manual.

item.description: Used pedal board in very good condition.

item.title: Altec Lansing RM 3010 Amplified Speaker System Monitor New in Box - $75 (Seekonk)
item.description: Altec Lansing RM 3010 Amplified Speaker System Monitor New in Box

item.title: CHARLESTOWN RI HUGE-SAT 8/2 & SUN 8/3 9-3 (Charlestown)
item.description: Huge yard sale in in Charlestown near the town hall Saturday, August 2 and Sunday, August 3 starts 9AM to 3PM. we have 50 years of accumulation, antiques collectibles, unusual items, kitchen and household items. No items for children no early birds. with: 12 or more antique stained glass windows, large parrot cage, Allagash canoe, smoker, vintage post office boxes, antique humidor, antique print trays, Small unusual corner shaped white sink, lots of tools, round pedestal oak dining room table, folding poker card table, lots of lamps, tables, antique birdcages, old stereos and speakers, chairs- wood rocking and other kinds, pictures and frames, toolboxes, antique wooden drying racks, antique scales, Dodge ram van rims, 2 sets of Buick wheel covers from a 1984 Park Ave. a wire set and a regular set, crocks, ab lounger exerciser, even the kitchen sink and Santa Claus

item.title: Huge yard sale Sat and Sun 7/12 & 7/13 8-1 (Smithfield)
item.description: Lots of stuff old and new including tools, golf clubs, bikes, knick knacks, small furniture, camping stuff, clothes, framed paintings and posters, high end speakers, receiver and subwoofers, lamps, costume jewelry, sports stuff (baseball and hockey mostly)and so much more!! Come on by and take a look No early birds please. 8-1

item.title: (2) SHURE ULXD4Q - Digital Wireless Receivers (w/ Microphones) - $8,000 (Providence)
item.description: (2) Like-New Shure ULXD4Q digital wireless receivers with (2) Shure SM58 wireless microphones. Used lightly in an auditorium space, no road use/wear. All powers on, includes surge protector.

item.title: Andy Timmons HALO Dual Echo/Delay Pedal - $125 (Westerly)
item.description: This item is in excellent condition and sells for $299 new, so this is a great price. This is an AMAZING delay unit from Keeley artist Andy Timmons.

item.title: Tiverton multi family yard sale (Providence)
item.description: Large multi family yard sale. 6 plus families on one site. Indoor and outdoor furniture, commercial rod iron bar and 4 stools, contemporary and antique clothing including fine European designer silk and satin scarves and military uniforms. Garden tools, tool boxes, component stereos, DVDs(many box sets) hundreds of CDs, sport books, binoculars, bird feeders, bric a brac and much more. 9 o'clock Saturday the 19th. 1728 Main Rd. Tiverton

item.title: Garmin Tacx Neo 2T Smart Trainer - $650 (Portsmouth)
item.description: Tacx Neo indoor trainer in great condition. Purchased new in 2021. 1000km ridden. Campagnolo or Shimano free hub body available and 11 speed or 12 speed (11-30) Cassette

item.title: Annual Multi Family Yard Sale Saturday & Sunday Matunuck (Shelldrake)
item.description: Annual, multi family, yard sale Shelldrake Rd Matunuck July 12th & 13th 8am-2pm. Lots of vintage 80s/90s, men's and women's clothing and shoes, new old stock with tags, record albums, cassettes, golf clubs and balls, Knick knacks, vintage kitchen items, totes that haven't been opened and more! Listing this sale for a friend.

item.title: Yamaha THR10II 20 Watt Amp with Effects and Aux Input - $200 (Westerly)
item.description: Yamaha THR10II 20 Watt Amp.
